{{< include latex-macros/macros.qmd >}}

## Odds and log-odds {.unnumbered}

:::{style="column-count: 2; column-gap: 2em;"}

**Odds**
$$\odds \eqdef \frac{\Pr(A)}{\Pr(\neg A)}$$

**Conditional odds**
$$\odds(A|B) \eqdef \frac{\Pr(A|B)}{\Pr(\neg A|B)}$$

**Odds function**
$$\oddsf{\pi} \eqdef \frac{\pi}{1-\pi}$$

**Probability to odds**
$$\odds = \frac{\prob}{1-\prob}$$

**Odds function equals odds**
$$\odds = \oddsf{\prob}$$

**Simplified odds expressions**
$$\oddsf{\pi} = \frac{1}{\pi^{-1}-1} = \invf{\pi^{-1}-1}$$

**Odds of a non-event**
$$\odds(\neg A) = \frac{1-\pi}{\pi} = \pi^{-1}-1$$

**Odds ratio**
$$\theta(\odds_1, \odds_2) \eqdef \frac{\odds_1}{\odds_2}$$

**OR as ratio of probability ratios**
$$\ba
\theta(\odds_1, \odds_2)
  &= \frac{\odds_1}{\odds_2} \\
  &= \frac{\paren{\frac{\pi_1}{1-\pi_1}}}{\paren{\frac{\pi_2}{1-\pi_2}}}
\ea$$

**Odds ratios are reversible**
$$\theta(A|B) = \theta(B|A)$$

**Conditional ORs are reversible**
$$\theta(A|B,C) = \theta(B|A,C)$$

:::

## Inverse-odds and probability recovery {.unnumbered}

:::{style="column-count: 2; column-gap: 2em;"}

**Odds to probability**
$$\pi = \frac{\odds}{1+\odds}$$

**Inverse-odds function**
$$\invoddsf{\odds} \eqdef \frac{\odds}{1 + \odds}$$

**Probability as inverse-odds**
$$\prob = \invoddsf{\odds}$$

**Simplified inverse-odds**
$$\invoddsf{\odds} = \frac{1}{1+\odds^{-1}} = (1+\odds^{-1})^{-1}$$

**One minus inverse-odds**
$$1 - \prob = \frac{1}{1+\odds}$$

**Complement of inverse-odds**
$$1+\odds = \frac{1}{1-\prob}$$

:::

## Log-odds (logit) and expit {.unnumbered}

:::{style="column-count: 2; column-gap: 2em;"}

**Log-odds**
$$\logodds \eqdef \logf{\omega}$$

**Log-odds from probability**
$$\logodds = \logf{\frac{\prob}{1-\prob}}$$

**Logit function**
$$\logit(\prob) \eqdef \logf{\oddsf{\prob}}$$

**Logit expanded**
$$\logit(\prob) = \logf{\frac{\prob}{1-\prob}}$$

**Log-odds equals logit**
$$\logodds = \logitf{\prob}$$

**Odds from log-odds**
$$\odds = \expf{\logodds}$$

**Probability from log-odds**
$$\prob = \frac{\expf{\eta}}{1+\expf{\eta}}$$

**Expit / inverse-logit function**
$$\expit(\logodds) \eqdef \invoddsf{\expf{\logodds}}$$

**Expit expressions**
$$\expit(\logodds) = \frac{\exp{\logodds}}{1+\exp{\logodds}} = (1 + \exp{-\logodds})^{-1}$$

**Probability as expit**
$$\prob = \expitf{\logodds}$$ {#eq-prob-as-expit}

**Logit and expit are inverses**
$$\logitf{\expitf{\logodds}} = \logodds \qquad \expitf{\logitf{\pi}} = \pi$$

:::

::: {#fig-expit-logit-diagram-summary}

{{< include _subfiles/logistic-regression/_fig-expit-logit-diagram-content.qmd >}}

Diagram of logistic regression link and inverse link functions

:::

## Rare events {.unnumbered}

:::{style="column-count: 2; column-gap: 2em;"}

**Odds minus probability**
$$\odds - \pi = \frac{\pi^2}{1-\pi}, \quad \text{where } \odds = \frac{\pi}{1-\pi}$$

:::

## Derivatives {.unnumbered}

{{< include _subfiles/logistic-regression/_eq-logistic-deriv-matrix.qmd >}}

Column labels indicate the numerators of the derivatives;
row labels indicate the denominators.

## Log-likelihood and score function {.unnumbered}

:::{style="column-count: 2; column-gap: 2em;"}

**Log-likelihood component**
$$\ell_i(\pi_i) = y_i \eta_i - \logf{1+\odds_i}$$

**Score function as sum**
$$\vec{\llik'}(\vb) = \sumin \vec{\llik'_i}(\vb)$$

**Score component**
$$\llik_i'(\vb) = \vx_i \devn_i$$

**Score function**
$$\vec{\llik'}(\vb) = \sumin \vx_i\devn_i = \tp{\mX}\vec{\devn}$$

:::

## MLE {.unnumbered}

:::{style="column-count: 2; column-gap: 2em;"}

**One-sample MLE for odds**
$$\hat{\odds}= \frac{x}{n-x}$$

:::

## Odds ratios in logistic regression {.unnumbered}

:::{style="column-count: 2; column-gap: 2em;"}

**General OR formula**
$$\ror(\vx,\vxs) = \expf{\logodds(\vx) - \logodds(\vxs)}$$

**Difference in log-odds**
$$\difflogodds \eqdef \logodds(\vx) - \logodds(\vxs)$$

**OR in terms of $\difflogodds$**
$$\ror(\vx,\vxs) = \expf{\difflogodds}$$

**$\difflogodds$ from covariates**
$$\difflogodds = (\vx - \vxs)\cdot\vb$$

**Difference in covariate patterns**
$$\diffvx \eqdef \vx - \vxs$$

**$\difflogodds$ from $\diffvx$**
$$\difflogodds = \diffvx \cdot \vb$$

**OR in terms of $\diffvx$**
$$\ror(\vx,\vxs) = \expf{(\diffvx) \cdot \vb}$$

**Log OR equals $\difflogodds$**
$$\logf{\ror(\vx,\vxs)} = \difflogodds$$

:::

## Inference for log-odds and odds ratios {.unnumbered}

:::{style="column-count: 2; column-gap: 2em;"}

**Estimated SE of log-odds**
$$\ba
\hVar{\hat\logodds(\vx)} &= \tp{\vx}\hat{\Sigma}\vx \\
\HSE{\hat\logodds(\vx)} &= \sqrt{\tp{\vx}\hat{\Sigma}\vx}
\ea$$

**Estimated SE of $\Delta\widehat{\logodds}$**
$$\ba
\hVar{\Delta{\hat\logodds}} &= \tp{\diffvx}\hat{\Sigma}(\diffvx) \\
\HSE{\Delta{\hat\logodds}} &= \sqrt{\tp{\diffvx}\hat{\Sigma}(\diffvx)}
\ea$$

:::

## Comparing probabilities {.unnumbered}

:::{style="column-count: 2; column-gap: 2em;"}

**Risk difference**
$$\delta(\pi_1,\pi_2) \eqdef \pi_1 - \pi_2$$

**Risk ratio**
$$\rho(\pi_1,\pi_2) \eqdef \frac{\pi_1}{\pi_2}$$

**Relative risk difference**
$$\xi(\pi_1,\pi_2) \eqdef \frac{\delta(\pi_1,\pi_2)}{\pi_2}$$

**RRD equals RR minus 1**
$$\xi(\pi_1,\pi_2) = \rho(\pi_1,\pi_2) - 1$$

:::

## Logistic regression model {.unnumbered}

:::{style="column-count: 2; column-gap: 2em;"}

**Logistic regression**
$$Y_i|\vX_i \simind \Ber(\pi(\vX_i)), \qquad \logitf{\pi(\vx)} = \tp{\vx}\vb$$

:::
